title: Anonymous FTP access enabled
description: FTP evidence suggests anonymous access is enabled. This allows unauthenticated users to browse or retrieve data.

title: Admin panel exposed
description: An administrative panel appears to be exposed. Review authentication controls and network access restrictions.

title: Missing web security headers
description: Web response evidence indicates important security headers are missing.

title: Weak TLS configuration detected
description: TLS evidence indicates weak protocol versions or insecure ciphers are enabled.

title: Directory listing enabled
description: Directory indexing appears enabled, potentially disclosing sensitive file names and structure.

title: SMB exposed to internet
description: SMB service exposure to untrusted networks increases risk of unauthorized access and wormable attacks.

title: Database service exposed to internet
description: A database service appears exposed to the internet. Restrict it to internal application networks.

title: Elasticsearch exposed without restriction
description: Elasticsearch exposure without network restrictions can leak sensitive indexed information.
